name: @firegrid/grid
description: Firegrid.Grid — the firegrid agent substrate (L3): the ratified end-user API (Tool/Agent/Session/Grid/TurnHandle + the model's choreography vocabulary), built as a TRUE consumer of the Firegrid.Durable (L2) contract. Surface promoted from examples/firegrid; bodies land via the T2 red corpus.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Grid.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/grid diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/grid lint is covered by F# compile'
